text:
すごいな、あんた！
これがみんなが言う守護輝士の
実力なんだな。勉強になったよ。

今の戦いで、色々掴めたよ。
俺も早く、アークスとしての
戦いに慣れないとな。

戦術を練り直さないと……
いや、先に武器強化か？　とにかく
参考になった、あ

That was awesome!
So this is the power of a Guardian, eh?
Sure has taught me a lot.

I figured out some things from the fight
just now. I really need to pick up the pace
to get used to this ARKS gig.

My tactics need work...
Or, maybe I should enhance my gear first.
Anyway, you've given me lots to think about. Thanks!
